title: FishCraft
description: The main mods needed to play on the server.
body:
![mainfh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed6a082bb7baed55b4155b0fd32a1edc86eb2223.png)
# Main
• This is a build with only the basic mods for a comfortable game on the [server](https://fishcraftserver.tilda.ws/).

• Mods: 41 ONLY CLIENT MODS

• Additional builds with a large number of mods for the server:
> [[FULL] FishCraft 2 Season](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fishcraft-2-season)

> [[Mini]FishCraft 1.0](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minifishcraft)

## [WhiteMeovv](https://discord.com/users/286530920587067393) - Author
## [Treska](https://discord.com/users/697665243630796861) - Author

For all questions, write to the authors' personal messages.
I also ask you to recommend this project to as many other people as possible. It's not difficult for you - we are pleased. Thank you for your attention!
